tools.name: get_contact
tools.title: Get Refael.ai contact info
tools.description: Returns Refael.ai's public contact channels (Facebook Messenger, email, phone) so an assistant can direct an interested user to the right place.

tools.name: get_services
tools.title: List Refael.ai services
tools.description: Returns Refael.ai's public service offerings and pricing (live AI avatars, WhatsApp/Messenger bots, custom integrations) as marketed on the landing page.

tools.name: submit_lead
tools.title: Submit a lead to Refael.ai
tools.description: Send a prospective customer's name and WhatsApp/phone to Refael.ai so the team can reply within one hour. Use this only when the person has explicitly asked to be contacted.

name.description: Full name of the person to contact.

phone.description: WhatsApp-capable phone number in international format, e.g. +9725XXXXXXXX.

note.description: Optional short message about what they want.
